summary: Fixed the Cursor exec crash on successful runs with null stdout and aligned the backend test contract to the actual headless Cursor agent invocation. Focused backend tests and the broader bootstrap test module now pass in the PR worktree.
work_completed: Updated `src/control_tower/backends.py` so `_cursor_exec()` normalizes `result.stdout` to an empty string before checking or writing it, preventing crashes when subprocess returns `stdout=None`.
Updated `tests/test_bootstrap.py` to assert the actual Cursor headless contract used by the implementation: `agent -p --output-format json`.
Added a regression test covering successful Cursor exec results with `stdout=None`, verifying no crash and no output file write.
Ran focused backend tests first with `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m unittest tests.test_bootstrap.BackendTests` and then the broader suite with `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m unittest tests.test_bootstrap`.

findings.message: Focused backend suite passed: 11 tests in `tests.test_bootstrap.BackendTests`.
Broader bootstrap/backend coverage passed: 75 tests in `tests.test_bootstrap`.
`python3 -m pytest ...` was not usable in this worktree because `pytest` is not installed, so verification used the repository's `unittest` module instead.

follow_up_recommendations: Proceed to review on PR 17; the Cursor-specific blockers in this task packet are resolved.
